title: Chapter 43
content:
Chapter 43

While she was in the middle of her intense orgasm, I raised her body by her knees, extracting about half of my dick out of her, before pushing her down on me instantly, making her let out a guttural moan, and yes, it was a moan.

Although it was a very intense moan, it was still a moan, with no indication of pain present. With the additional flow of mana, now there was no chance of pain, only pleasure. Thick, deep, relentless pleasure.

And just like that, in that very position, once her throes of orgasm passed, I began to fuck her. This time it was just fucking, no mercy. I wasn't holding back anymore with no regard to her pain or pleasure.

Even when she came again, I didn't stop. The tight grasp on my dick that would constantly turn on and off as I exited her ass and entered it deep again, it got to the point I couldn't think of anything else.

Luckily, we weren't interrupted again and I kept fucking her for the next eighteen minutes without a break. Standing doggy, missionary, and pile diver. I went through these positions mercilessly without caring about her well-being. After all, even if she wanted to, she was in no state to push me away. She was just limp, her legs almost touching the ground above her head as her back was turned at an odd angle.

Finally, I was close to cumming. While she was still in the pile diver position, I came inside her asshole, emptying my reserves deep inside of her before I pulled out when I still had a few spurts left inside me, bathing her tits that were pressed against her thighs and her face.

She instinctively closed her eyes as my spunk landed on her face, but she did not attempt to cover her face. Some of it entered her mouth since it was already hanging open, her tongue out as she took deep breaths, finally, now that her torture was over.

I stood up, barely any strength in my knees after that extensive exercise, but I had to admire the marvel I had created. There she was, her legs raised above her head, her thighs mashed into her giant watermelons, her tongue hanging out of her open mouth and most of them all, the gaping pit called her asshole that was slowly getting back to its usual state now that nothing was intruding inside to stretch it.

And to enhance that perfection, the coating of my semen on almost all of her body. Her asshole spurted some every now and then and some trickled down her chest onto her neck. From her face, some trickled down into her mouth from her chin while some headed for her eyes which were still only half open, some of my cum smeared on eyelashes as well.

She was covered in my sticky fluid, mixed with some of her own pussy juices that fell on her when she came in the pile diver position and finally the unique fragrance of sweat. The blend of these three musky scents was so intoxicating that it was lighting up my surroundings, turning me on slightly.

"Haa... Haa..."

Life was fucking amazing.

~~

It was almost bright when we returned. Well, I returned carrying Sandra, who was too tired to walk. She fell asleep halfway, so she didn't say anything or display her dissatisfaction with the involuntary pleasure that she had denied in the beginning.

The rest of the family was still asleep, dead tired, so I placed Sandra down to get some rest as well. I decided to push the training time to seven to have some time for myself. After all, two new things had appeared before me, something that had never happened before in all of my lives.

In all the worlds I had lived in, the system functions and the achievements remained the same always. They never changed in any way, so there was not much trouble in raising my strength through achievements.

However, in this world, there had been a few oddities.

First of all, the level restriction. Whenever I would reach level fifty in any of my previous worlds, I would stop receiving EXP or coins from the lower-ranked monsters, and the monsters that were a ladder up would take their place.

However, in this world, even when I reached the level fifty mark, I still received EXP and coins from the lower-level monsters, and the acquisition from the monsters remained the same.

That was a blessing in itself, but another blessing was the stream of achievements. While some remained the same, some were new, very, very new. I had never seen those before, such as the one I received when I was having sex with Sandra just now.

And these...

[Anal intruder]

[Requirement: Have brutal anal with a blood relative]

[Effect: Anal pain with anyone having the same blood as the user would be removed]

[This effect is only applicable to those who are blood relatives of the user]

[...]

[Full bathing]

[Requirement: Cover all the essential parts of your partner in one ejaculation]

[Effect: Semen effect +10]

The first achievement was something I had never obtained before in my life. The second one was unfamiliar as well, but it was strange in another sense. I didn't know what the semen effect meant at all. What was it supposed to do? Improve the taste, enhance the consistency, or something like that.

Or was there something else?

I had never encountered such a thing, and I didn't know what it meant. Even when I asked the system, no reply came. As I said before, the system only replied under certain conditions, not always.

As such, it didn't reply this time, which was a bummer. Well, it almost never did before either but it was still helpful in some conditions like when I had to take over that AI in the futuristic world and take control of everything it controlled as well, becoming the bad guy in an instant from the good guy who was helping the good guys capture the bad guys.

Long story, not necessary.

Anyway, I didn't get the answer that I needed. I didn't know what semen level meant, but for some reason, I had a hunch. I remembered Sandra breaking through her aura stage the other day in the bathroom. It was due to my semen as well.

What if this semen level decides the enhancement effect? What if its increment meant the benefits the women I'd have sex with would get increased as well? Such as breaking through faster than before or something like that. I didn't know, and there was a strong need for research. Unfortunately, there was nothing I could do for the next twelve hours.

Finally done with all the choices and the decisions, I decided to focus on the remaining problem at hand. Experimenting.

Sandra or Rayla weren't good test subjects as they were already under the effect of my semen. Of course, I was still going to fu---... experiment on them. But a fresh subject was needed. Thankfully, there was a perfect candidate for that. It was time to finally, and fully, devour the strawberries.

~~

The rest of the day was pretty much normal. Once again, extensive exercises to the point every fiber in their bodies broke down, especially Rayla, since she was a mage class, followed by a session of cultivation. I helped them all with the circulations, focusing most on Rayla since her matter was a little more delicate.

Of course, I kept my hands to myself, especially around the aura users because circulation, especially aura circulation, was a risky process.

It required one's utmost focus and even care, so I had to keep them all under strict observation to make sure there were no unseen accidents.

Another thing that I discovered during today's and yesterday's practice was that this family was really untalented. If I had to describe their talent scales from 0 to 10, then Rayla would be a 2, Sandra would be a 1, along with Lucas, while Julian and Martha were 0.000005.

Julian was beyond help since even with the strongest of circulation techniques, he wouldn't be able to make it past the sixth circle unless he were to live forever like me. The fact that he had reached the peak of a second star was already a miracle.

As for Martha, she would be in the same boat, but I had a feeling my special circumstances could change that.

Of course, I would have to check that out as well, but I had a very good feeling it would help. What I required for that, though, was mana, and it would soon apply to me as well.

Finally, the day passed after extensive practice, and the family improved by a bit, just a bit, but it was more than enough, and the dusk came to be.

We lit up a fire, I set up the invisible barrier so nothing would disturb us, but there were unlikely to be any creatures. I killed most of them yesterday, and we didn't see any today as well. We didn't go to hunt as well, so that could have been a factor.

Anyway, we ate, and then everyone fell asleep, but I asked Martha to remain awake even though I could feel how heavy her eyes were.

With a smile, I handed her a stamina potion, which was yellow in color. Looking at it, she asked, "What is this, brother?"

I smiled gently and said, "It's something you're going to need a lot tonight."

And with that, it was time to devour the strawberries.

~~

A brief note. I won't be in contact for two days as I am being admitted to the hospital. Laptops aren't allowed there, and I can't do the publishing through my phone. Although it's a bummer, as soon as I'm discharged, I'll make it up to all of you.

In the meantime, visit my Patreon page and see something you might like. Most of the posts there are free, so tell me what you think. Once I return, I expect a plethora of suggestions and requests to give me new ideas as I'm nearing the end of my stocked chapters.

Remember, don't go too far from the idea or the genre.

Degenerate ideas are welcome, though.

Consider this a polling system. Discuss it among yourselves in the comments and on my page, and I'll give them all a read. It would help a lot if they were not too spread out.

That's it. See you in two days.
